title: alchemilla vulgaris subvar. lineata
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subvar. lineata, also known as the lady's mantle, is a plant species within the Alchemilla genus, characterized by its distinctive, striped or lined leaves. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subvar. lineata are said to include soothing menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the leaves being harvested and dried for use in these formulations.
